description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage, using a global untracked cache and default image ruby:2.4. Add a brakeman job in the test stage that runs a before_script installing the brakeman gem with "gem install brakeman --no-ri --no-rdoc" and then executes "brakeman --exit-on-warn". Add a bundle_audit job in the test stage that installs the bundle-audit gem via "gem install bundle-audit --no-ri --no-rdoc" and runs "bundle-audit check --update". Add a rubocop job in the test stage that installs rubocop using "gem install rubocop --no-ri --no-rdoc" and runs "rubocop -D". Add system_test and test jobs in the test stage that both use the "unused/rails-system-test" image, the "mongo:latest" service, set variables MONGO_HOST=mongo and RAILS_ENV=test, execute a shared before_script (ruby -v; which ruby; echo $RAILS_ENV; gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc; bundle install --jobs $(nproc) "${FLAGS[@]}"; bundle exec bin/rails yarn:install; bundle exec bin/rails db:mongoid:create_indexes) and then run respectively "bundle exec bin/rails test:system" for system_test and "bundle exec bin/rails test" for test.
